 Holder Address...Validator Node address                                                30DTf............Tfuel earned in the last 30 days
 Tag..............Likely owner of Validator                                             30DTfUSD.........30 day Tfuel earnings in USD at todays price
 Theta............Amount of Theta being staked                                          Status...........Online/Offline status
 USD..............Value of Theta staked in USD                                          ExStatus.........More detailed infomation about the status of the node
 1D%..............% of Checkpoints (100 blocks) with activity is the last day           StN..............[Source to Node] How many source addresses (wallets) are staking to this Validator Node
 7D%..............% of Checkpoints (100 blocks) with activity is the last seven days    NtS..............[Node to Source] How many Validator Nodes are staking from source addess(es) (wallets)
 30D%.............% of Checkpoints (100 blocks) with activity is the last thirty days   30DMC............Number of missed grouped 100 blocks in the last 30 days
 100A%............% of blocks signed in the last 100 blocks                             Checkpoint.......Grading Validator nodes in the same manor as Guardian nodes
 1DA%.............% of blocks signed in the last day                                    *................Rumored
 7DA%.............% of blocks signed in the last seven days
 30DA%............% of blocks signed in the last thirty days

 Holder Address...Guardian Node address                     30DTf............Tfuel earned in the last 30 days
 Tag..............Custom names for Guardian Nodes           30DTfUSD.........30 day earnings in USD at todays price
 Uptime...........Best performing Guardian Nodes            Status...........Online/Offline status
 Theta............Amount of Theta being staked              ExStatus.........More detailed infomation about the status of the node
 USD..............Value of Theta staked in USD              SA...............How many source addresses (wallets) are staking to this Guardian Node
 1D%..............1 Day Efficiency Report as percent        30DMC............Number of missed checkpoint reward blocks in the last 30 days
 7D%..............7 Day Efficiency Report as percent        Last Signature...Last signed checkpoint block time
 30D%.............30 Day Efficiency Report as percent       SS...............Signature Share, the number of times your vote is seen on the network (more the better)
 1DTf.............Tfuel earned in the last 24 hours         Network .........See how well the votes are propagating thew the network (graph of SS)
 1DTfL............Tfuel lost in the last 24 hours

 Holder Address...Guardian Node address                     30DTf............Tfuel earned in the last 30 days
 Tag..............Custom names for Guardian Nodes           30DTfUSD.........30 day earnings in USD at todays price
 Uptime...........Best performing Guardian Nodes            Status...........Online/Offline status
 Theta............Amount of Theta being staked              ExStatus.........More detailed infomation about the status of the node
 USD..............Value of Theta staked in USD              SA...............How many source addresses (wallets) are staking to this Guardian Node
 1D%..............1 Day Efficiency Report as percent        30DMC............Number of missed checkpoint reward blocks in the last 30 days
 7D%..............7 Day Efficiency Report as percent        Last Signature...Last signed checkpoint block time
 30D%.............30 Day Efficiency Report as percent       SS...............Signature Share, the number of times your vote is seen on the network (more the better)
 1DTf.............Tfuel earned in the last 24 hours         Network .........See how well the votes are propagating thew the network (graph of SS)
 1DTfL............Tfuel lost in the last 24 hours










Now compatible with uptimerobot.com for round the clock monitoring of
your node. This site monitors the blockchain in real time and can
send immediate notifications of problems in conjunction with Uptime
Robot.

UptimeRobot.com
(1) Create a free account at uptimerobot.com
(2) Create a new monitor and select keyword as the monitor type
(3) Give the monitor a name
(4) The URL is https://guardianmonitor.io/tables/offlinelist.txt
(5) The Keyword is your Guardian Node address
(6) Select the keyword does exist
(7) Check the boxes on how you want to get notified




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

any kind incurred or suffered as a result of the use or non-use of the information presented on this website or the use of defective or incomplete information unless
